strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to lead and ship complex systems including GIS platforms and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong devops and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Resume lists job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) inconsistent with entry-level role requirements
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js — key required technologies in the job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: James brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, React, and scalable architecture, with strong devops and open-source contributions that align with the role’s technical demands — but his senior job titles, lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience, and limited German proficiency raise concerns about fit for an entry-level, on-site position in Berlin.
